{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Sunsails
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|There are three galleon-style [[Sunsails]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Sunsail is a starship drifting without power.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
